mapper.select: SELECT * FROM city ORDER BY province, city_name

SELECT * FROM city
AND (city_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR province LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY province, city_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO city(city_name, province, longitude, latitude, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{cityName}, #{province}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, NOW(), NOW())
